discovery_metadata.notes: max_iterations raised to 1000 and damping to 0.8 to tame the BR-feedback non-convergence that affected PLEIO_003 (BRI1 KO) and PLEIO_011 (DWF4 KO) in the previous run. Dense bidirectional dynamics (avg 2.14 regulators/node after patch) benefit from stronger damping.

detailed_results.gene: tir1 afb1 afb2 afb3 afb4 afb5
